value.description: CSS value: color hex, gradient, image URL

isDark.description: True if footer has dark background with light text

layoutSpacing.description: Padding/margin parity vs source — values as normalized px strings from getComputedStyle (e.g. 48px). Measure on live source, then on migrated preview; re-measure after CSS changes.

contentInsetInline.description: Main inner content horizontal inset (padding-left/right on wrapper or equivalent; single representative px if symmetric)

columnGapApprox.description: Approx horizontal gap between adjacent primary columns (px)

majorBandGapApprox.description: Approx vertical gap between major horizontal bands (e.g. link row vs promo vs bottom bar)

notes.description: Optional — e.g. asymmetric columns, rounded container padding

sectionBackgrounds.description: Per-section background when sections have different backgrounds

leadCaptureBand.description: Optional — any prominent footer form band (newsletter, signup, lead form, etc.). Omit if the footer has no such band.

present.description: True if this footer includes a multi-field capture/form band above the main link columns

inputSurface.description: Visible surface treatment of text inputs (source vs migrated)

primaryButtonAlignment.description: Alignment of the primary submit/action button within the band

fieldLayoutDesktop.description: Desktop layout of text fields in the band: single-row = one horizontal row; multi-row = grid/wrap; stacked = one field per row

notes.description: Optional — spacing or padding notes not covered by enums

promoMediaBand.description: Optional — tall photographic/promotional strip inside the footer (hero lineup, campaign image, etc.). Required in mapping when phase-1 detects a large image-dominant band or equivalent; omit if absent.

containerHeightPx.description: Measured outer height of the media band container (px string, e.g. 697px)

mediaWidthBehavior.description: Whether imagery spans viewport, sits inset with content padding, or is capped with max-width

objectFit.description: Computed object-fit on the primary (or representative media element)

domBandPosition.description: Order of this band relative to CTA strip and lead-capture form

primaryLinkBand.description: Optional — desktop layout of the main footer link/navigation area (multi-column grids vs accordions). Omit if the footer has no multi-link nav band.

desktopLinkLayoutPattern.description: multi-column-static = several parallel link columns; accordion-primary = expand/collapse groups dominate; split-static-and-accordion = e.g. left flat list + right accordions

desktopVisibleLinkColumnsApprox.description: Approximate count of parallel vertical link stacks at desktop (each static column counts; one accordion rail counts as 1 unless multiple rails sit side-by-side)

noticeStrip.description: Optional — distinct legal, certification, disclaimer, or badge block (often contrasting background). Omit if absent.

layout.description: full-width-bar = edge-to-edge strip; inset-card = self-contained box; in-column = inside a link column

markPosition.description: Position of emblem, seal, or logo relative to copy inside the block
